executiveSummary.currentState: Current automation is primarily rules-based: API calls, predefined rules, custom scrapers, and regex parsing. Little to no generative or agentic AI is in production today.
executiveSummary.topImprovement: Add human-reviewed AI assistance to bankruptcy monitoring exception handling, where the confirmed rules-based pipeline already produces reviewable exceptions.
executiveSummary.risks: Product-accuracy, compliance review, and data-privacy boundaries must gate any generative step; no capability is presented as adopted before it is confirmed.
executiveSummary.recommendation: Third i evaluates the workflow first and the tool second. Begin with one bounded, high-value pilot with explicit human review and success criteria.
executiveSummary.positioning: Rankings and new releases help identify candidates, but the recommendation is based on bkWatch's work, risk, cost, and adoption path.
executiveSummary.source: BankruptcyWatch factual canon — AI Use Audit
